editorNotes.purpose: Lists Markdown fragments concatenated (in order) into the STATIC half of the own-engine system prompt. The DYNAMIC half is built in code (buildDynamicContext) and is never edited here.
doNotPutInTheseFiles: Per-request custom instructions from the builder UI
Full scaffold JSON or serialized scaffold body
Route plan, pre-generation contracts, template-library matches
Structured brief fields from deep brief (unless you intentionally duplicate — avoid)
